name: region_flags
description: Region protection with block break/place, interaction flags, and fixed OP/admin bypass.
globals: (function() { return { selections: {}, warns: {}, defaultFlags: {'break': false, 'place': false, 'interact': true, 'trample': false}, validFlags: {'break': true, 'place': true, 'interact': true, 'trample': true}, flagList: ['break', 'place', 'interact', 'trample'], table: function() { try { return database.table('regions'); } catch (e) { return database.createTable('regions'); } }, cleanName: function(n) { return String(n || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/g, '_'); }, asBool: function(v) { v = String(v || '').toLowerCase(); if (v === 'allow' || v === 'true' || v === 'on' || v === 'yes') return true; if (v === 'deny' || v === 'false' || v === 'off' || v === 'no') return false; return null; }, jsList: function(list) { var out = []; if (!list) return out; if (typeof list.size === 'function') { for (var i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) out.push(String(list.get(i))); } else { for (var j = 0; j < list.length; j++) out.push(String(list[j])); } return out; }, posBlock: function(b) { return {world: b.getWorld().getName(), x: b.getX(), y: b.getY(), z: b.getZ()}; }, posLoc: function(loc) { return {world: loc.getWorldName(), x: Math.floor(loc.getX()), y: Math.floor(loc.getY()), z: Math.floor(loc.getZ())}; }, setSelection: function(player, key, pos) { var id = player.getId(); if (!this.selections[id]) this.selections[id] = {}; this.selections[id][key] = pos; }, fmtPos: function(p) { return p.world + ' ' + p.x + ',' + p.y + ',' + p.z; }, volume: function(r) { return (r.max.x - r.min.x + 1) * (r.max.y - r.min.y + 1) * (r.max.z - r.min.z + 1); }, normalizeRegion: function(r) { if (!r.flags) r.flags = {}; for (var i = 0; i < this.flagList.length; i++) { var f = this.flagList[i]; if (typeof r.flags[f] === 'undefined') r.flags[f] = this.defaultFlags[f]; } return r; }, contains: function(r, world, x, y, z) { return r && r.world === world && x >= r.min.x && x <= r.max.x && y >= r.min.y && y <= r.max.y && z >= r.min.z && z <= r.max.z; }, regionsAt: function(world, x, y, z) { var out = []; var t = this.table(); var ids = this.jsList(t.ids()); for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) { var r = t.get(ids[i]); if (r) this.normalizeRegion(r); if (this.contains(r, world, x, y, z)) out.push(r); } var self = this; out.sort(function(a, b) { var pa = a.priority || 0; var pb = b.priority || 0; if (pa !== pb) return pb - pa; return self.volume(a) - self.volume(b); }); return out; }, flagAt: function(world, x, y, z, flag, def) { var regs = this.regionsAt(world, x, y, z); if (regs.length === 0) return def; for (var i = 0; i < regs.length; i++) { if (regs[i].flags && typeof regs[i].flags[flag] !== 'undefined') return !!regs[i].flags[flag]; } if (typeof this.defaultFlags[flag] !== 'undefined') return !!this.defaultFlags[flag]; return def; }, bypass: function(player) { if (!player) return false; try { if (player.isOp && player.isOp()) return true; } catch (e1) {} try { if (player.hasPermission && player.hasPermission('vibe.region.bypass')) return true; } catch (e2) {} try { if (player.checkPermission && player.checkPermission('vibe.region.bypass')) return true; } catch (e3) {} try { if (player.hasPermission && player.hasPermission('vibe.region.*')) return true; } catch (e4) {} return false; }, canAdmin: function(player) { if (!player) return false; try { if (player.isOp && player.isOp()) return true; } catch (e1) {} try { if (player.hasPermission && player.hasPermission('vibe.region')) return true; } catch (e2) {} try { if (player.hasPermission && player.hasPermission('vibe.region.bypass')) return true; } catch (e3) {} return false; }, warn: function(player, msg) { if (!player) return; var key = player.getId() + ':' + msg; var now = Date.now(); if (!this.warns[key] || now - this.warns[key] > 1500) { this.warns[key] = now; player.sendMessage(msg); } }, eventPlayer: function(ctx) { try { return ctx.getPlayer(); } catch (e) { return null; } }, protectEventBlock: function(ctx, flag, msg) { if (!ctx.isCancellable() || ctx.isCancelled()) return false; var player = this.eventPlayer(ctx); if (player && this.bypass(player)) return false; var block = ctx.getBlock(); if (!block) return false; var world = block.getWorld().getName(); var x = block.getX(); var y = block.getY(); var z = block.getZ(); if (this.flagAt(world, x, y, z, flag, true)) return false; ctx.setCancelled(true); this.warn(player, msg); return true; }, isProbablyPlaceable: function(item) { if (!item || item.isEmpty()) return false; var m = String(item.getType() || '').toUpperCase(); if (m === 'AIR') return false; var non = {'BOW':1,'CROSSBOW':1,'TRIDENT':1,'SHIELD':1,'SHEARS':1,'FISHING_ROD':1,'CARROT_ON_A_STICK':1,'WARPED_FUNGUS_ON_A_STICK':1,'COMPASS':1,'RECOVERY_COMPASS':1,'CLOCK':1,'SPYGLASS':1,'MAP':1,'FILLED_MAP':1,'BOOK':1,'WRITABLE_BOOK':1,'WRITTEN_BOOK':1,'ENDER_PEARL':1,'SNOWBALL':1,'EGG':1,'FIREWORK_ROCKET':1,'EXPERIENCE_BOTTLE':1,'BREAD':1,'APPLE':1,'GOLDEN_APPLE':1,'ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE':1,'COOKED_BEEF':1,'BEEF':1,'PORKCHOP':1,'COOKED_PORKCHOP':1,'CHICKEN':1,'COOKED_CHICKEN':1,'MUTTON':1,'COOKED_MUTTON':1,'RABBIT':1,'COOKED_RABBIT':1,'COD':1,'COOKED_COD':1,'SALMON':1,'COOKED_SALMON':1,'COOKIE':1,'MELON_SLICE':1,'PUMPKIN_PIE':1,'CARROT':1,'POTATO':1,'BAKED_POTATO':1,'POISONOUS_POTATO':1,'BEETROOT':1,'SWEET_BERRIES':1,'GLOW_BERRIES':1,'CHORUS_FRUIT':1,'ROTTEN_FLESH':1,'BONE':1,'BONE_MEAL':1}; if (non[m]) return false; var badSuffix = ['_SWORD','_PICKAXE','_AXE','_SHOVEL','_HOE','_HELMET','_CHESTPLATE','_LEGGINGS','_BOOTS','_HORSE_ARMOR','_MINECART','_BOAT','_RAFT','_SPAWN_EGG']; for (var i = 0; i < badSuffix.length; i++) if (m.endsWith(badSuffix[i])) return false; return true; } }; })

commands.label: region
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); var args = ctx.getArgs(); var table = state.table(); function help() { sender.sendMessage('&6Region commands:'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region wand &7- get selection wand'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region pos1|pos2 &7- set positions to your feet'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region create <name> [priority] [vertical] &7- create protected region'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region vertical <name> &7- expand region from Y -64 to 320'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region flag <name> <break|place|interact|trample> <allow|deny>'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region check [x y z] &7- diagnose flags and bypass status'); sender.sendMessage('&e/region info <name>&7, &e/region here&7, &e/region list&7, &e/region delete <name>'); } if (args.length === 0) { help(); return; } var sub = String(args[0]).toLowerCase(); if (sub === 'help') { help(); return; } if (sub === 'wand') { if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } sender.asPlayer().giveTaggedItem('WOODEN_AXE', 1, '&aRegion Wand', 'vibe_region_tool', 'wand'); sender.sendMessage('&aRegion wand given. Left-click pos1, right-click pos2.'); return; } if (sub === 'pos1' || sub === 'pos2') { if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var pl = sender.asPlayer(); var pos = state.posLoc(pl.getLocation()); state.setSelection(pl, sub, pos); sender.sendMessage('&aRegion ' + sub + ' set to &f' + state.fmtPos(pos)); return; } if (sub === 'create') { if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /region create <name> [priority] [vertical]'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var sel = state.selections[player.getId()]; if (!sel || !sel.pos1 || !sel.pos2) { sender.sendMessage('&cSet pos1 and pos2 first. Use /region wand or /region pos1 and /region pos2.'); return; } if (sel.pos1.world !== sel.pos2.world) { sender.sendMessage('&cBoth positions must be in the same world.'); return; } var id = state.cleanName(args[1]); if (!id) { sender.sendMessage('&cInvalid region name.'); return; } if (table.has(id)) { sender.sendMessage('&cA region with that name already exists.'); return; } var pr = 0; var vertical = false; for (var ai = 2; ai < args.length; ai++) { var av = String(args[ai]).toLowerCase(); if (av === 'vertical' || av === 'fullheight' || av === 'full') vertical = true; else { var pn = parseInt(av, 10); if (!isNaN(pn)) pr = pn; } } var minY = Math.min(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var maxY = Math.max(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); if (vertical) { minY = -64; maxY = 320; } var r = {id: id, name: id, world: sel.pos1.world, priority: pr, creator: sender.getName(), flags: {'break': state.defaultFlags['break'], 'place': state.defaultFlags['place'], 'interact': state.defaultFlags['interact'], 'trample': state.defaultFlags['trample']}, min: {x: Math.min(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x), y: minY, z: Math.min(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z)}, max: {x: Math.max(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x), y: maxY, z: Math.max(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z)}}; table.put(id, r); sender.sendMessage('&aCreated region &f' + id + '&a. Default flags: break deny, place deny, interact allow, trample deny.'); if (!vertical && r.min.y === r.max.y) sender.sendMessage('&eNote: this region is only one block tall. Use &f/region vertical ' + id + '&e to protect all heights.'); return; } if (sub === 'vertical' || sub === 'expandvert' || sub === 'fullheight') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /region vertical <name>'); return; } var vid = state.cleanName(args[1]); if (!table.has(vid)) { sender.sendMessage('&cRegion not found.'); return; } var vr = table.get(vid); state.normalizeRegion(vr); vr.min.y = -64; vr.max.y = 320; table.put(vid, vr); sender.sendMessage('&aRegion &f' + vid + '&a now protects from Y -64 to 320.'); return; } if (sub === 'delete' || sub === 'remove') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /region delete <name>'); return; } var del = state.cleanName(args[1]); if (!table.has(del)) { sender.sendMessage('&cRegion not found.'); return; } table.delete(del); sender.sendMessage('&aDeleted region &f' + del); return; } if (sub === 'list') { var ids = state.jsList(table.ids()); if (ids.length === 0) { sender.sendMessage('&7No regions created.'); return; } sender.sendMessage('&aRegions: &f' + ids.join('&7, &f')); return; } if (sub === 'info') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /region info <name>'); return; } var infoId = state.cleanName(args[1]); if (!table.has(infoId)) { sender.sendMessage('&cRegion not found.'); return; } var rr = table.get(infoId); state.normalizeRegion(rr); table.put(infoId, rr); sender.sendMessage('&6Region &f' + rr.name + '&6 in &f' + rr.world + '&6 priority &f' + (rr.priority || 0)); sender.sendMessage('&7Min: &f' + state.fmtPos({world: rr.world, x: rr.min.x, y: rr.min.y, z: rr.min.z})); sender.sendMessage('&7Max: &f' + state.fmtPos({world: rr.world, x: rr.max.x, y: rr.max.y, z: rr.max.z})); sender.sendMessage('&7Flags: &fbreak=' + (rr.flags['break'] ? 'allow' : 'deny') + '&7, &fplace=' + (rr.flags['place'] ? 'allow' : 'deny') + '&7, &finteract=' + (rr.flags['interact'] ? 'allow' : 'deny') + '&7, &ftrample=' + (rr.flags['trample'] ? 'allow' : 'deny')); return; } if (sub === 'here' || sub === 'check') { if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var cp = sender.asPlayer(); var loc = cp.getLocation(); var world = loc.getWorldName(); var x = Math.floor(loc.getX()); var y = Math.floor(loc.getY()); var z = Math.floor(loc.getZ()); if (sub === 'check' && args.length >= 4) { var px = parseInt(args[1], 10); var py = parseInt(args[2], 10); var pz = parseInt(args[3], 10); if (isNaN(px) || isNaN(py) || isNaN(pz)) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /region check [x y z]'); return; } x = px; y = py; z = pz; } var regs = state.regionsAt(world, x, y, z); sender.sendMessage('&6Region check at &f' + world + ' ' + x + ',' + y + ',' + z); sender.sendMessage('&7Your bypass: ' + (state.bypass(cp) ? '&aYES &7(OP or permission &fvibe.region.bypass&7)' : '&cNO')); if (regs.length === 0) { sender.sendMessage('&7No region covers this exact block. If your region is only one block tall, use /region vertical <name>.'); return; } for (var ci = 0; ci < regs.length; ci++) { var cr = regs[ci]; state.normalizeRegion(cr); sender.sendMessage('&a' + cr.name + ' &7p' + (cr.priority || 0) + ' &fbreak=' + (cr.flags['break'] ? 'allow' : 'deny') + '&7, &fplace=' + (cr.flags['place'] ? 'allow' : 'deny') + '&7, &finteract=' + (cr.flags['interact'] ? 'allow' : 'deny') + '&7, &ftrample=' + (cr.flags['trample'] ? 'allow' : 'deny')); } return; } if (sub === 'flag') { if (args.length < 4) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /region flag <name> <break|place|interact|trample> <allow|deny>'); return; } var rid = state.cleanName(args[1]); if (!table.has(rid)) { sender.sendMessage('&cRegion not found.'); return; } var flag = String(args[2]).toLowerCase(); if (!state.validFlags[flag]) { sender.sendMessage('&cUnknown flag. Valid flags: &f' + state.flagList.join(', ')); return; } var val = state.asBool(args[3]); if (val === null) { sender.sendMessage('&cUse allow/deny, true/false, on/off, or yes/no.'); return; } var reg = table.get(rid); state.normalizeRegion(reg); reg.flags[flag] = val; table.put(rid, reg); sender.sendMessage('&aFlag &f' + flag + '&a for region &f' + rid + '&a set to &f' + (val ? 'allow' : 'deny')); return; } help(); })

events.code: (function(ctx, state) { state.protectEventBlock(ctx, 'break', '&cYou cannot break blocks in this protected region.'); })
(function(ctx, state) { state.protectEventBlock(ctx, 'place', '&cYou cannot place blocks in this protected region.'); })

(function(ctx, state) { if (!ctx.isMainHand()) return; var player = ctx.getPlayer(); var action = String(ctx.getAction() || ''); var block = ctx.getBlock(); if (player && block) { var item = null; try { item = player.getItemInMainHand(); } catch (e) {} try { if (item && item.dataEquals('vibe_region_tool', 'wand') && state.canAdmin(player)) { if (action === 'LEFT_CLICK_BLOCK') { var p1 = state.posBlock(block); state.setSelection(player, 'pos1', p1); if (ctx.isCancellable()) ctx.setCancelled(true); player.sendMessage('&aRegion pos1 set to &f' + state.fmtPos(p1)); return; } if (action === 'RIGHT_CLICK_BLOCK') { var p2 = state.posBlock(block); state.setSelection(player, 'pos2', p2); if (ctx.isCancellable()) ctx.setCancelled(true); player.sendMessage('&aRegion pos2 set to &f' + state.fmtPos(p2)); return; } } } catch (e2) {} } if (!ctx.isCancellable() || ctx.isCancelled()) return; if (!player || !block || state.bypass(player)) return; var world = block.getWorld().getName(); var x = block.getX(); var y = block.getY(); var z = block.getZ(); if (action === 'PHYSICAL') { if (!state.flagAt(world, x, y, z, 'trample', true)) { ctx.setCancelled(true); state.warn(player, '&cYou cannot trample crops or pressure plates in this protected region.'); } return; } if (action === 'RIGHT_CLICK_BLOCK') { var held = null; try { held = player.getItemInMainHand(); } catch (e3) {} if (state.isProbablyPlaceable(held) && !state.flagAt(world, x, y, z, 'place', true)) { ctx.setCancelled(true); state.warn(player, '&cYou cannot place blocks in this protected region.'); return; } if (!state.flagAt(world, x, y, z, 'interact', true)) { ctx.setCancelled(true); state.warn(player, '&cYou cannot interact with blocks in this protected region.'); } } })
